diagrams.title: Linear Combination in R² - Two Independent Vectors
diagrams.description: Shows how any point in R² can be reached by combining two non-parallel vectors
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how span of two independent vectors covers entire R² plane

diagrams.title: Linear Combination in R² - Single Vector
diagrams.description: Shows that span of one vector is only a line through origin
elements: Negative scalar multiples in opposite direction
diagrams.purpose: Understand why one vector cannot span R²

diagrams.title: Linear Dependence Visualization
diagrams.description: Two parallel vectors - one is scalar multiple of other
elements: Second vector v₂ parallel to v₁
diagrams.purpose: Visualize linear dependence: parallel vectors are always dependent

diagrams.title: Span as Subspace in R³
diagrams.description: Two independent vectors in R³ span a plane passing through origin
elements: Plane spanned by v₁ and v₂
diagrams.purpose: Understand span of 2 independent vectors in R³ creates 2D subspace
